title: GroupBy.apply is much slower in 1.9.0 vs 1.8.3
body: Seeing a performance regression on groupby apply with axis=None. My pipeline got 2x slower.

title: TypeError when using infer_dtype in concat
body: After upgrading to v1.9.0 this fails: TypeError: infer_dtype is deprecated; use dtype='infer'. This looks like a breaking change for our code.

title: pip install fails with pandas>=2.0
body: pip install mydf==1.9.0 fails due to dependency version conflict with pandas 2.0. Is there a fix?

title: Confusing example in join docs for left join semantics
body: The documentation example for left join is confusing and doesn't match the text. The docs should clarify Null handling.

title: Feature request: add rolling quantile
body: It would be great to have a rolling quantile operator with a configurable interpolation method.
